::: {.legend}

[]{#legend-info}
**Explanation of symbols and color-coding**

<div class="legend-grid">

  <div>[]{.reading}</div>
  <div>This is a general background reading. Read this the usual way people read things, from start to finish.</div>

  <div>[]{.article}</div>
  <div>This is a scientific article (primary literature). Do not try to read this from start to finish. Instead, read/survey the article using [this process](https://hrgetz.github.io/guide.html). Fill out a [summary sheet](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1a4gz3wIFyBtgsPicKq_pLwk5VNVqK_yg-sUg-GYwf7A/edit?tab=t.0) for your own notes (summary sheets will not be graded). Come prepared to work in small groups to further understand the paper.
  </div>
  <div>[]{.controversy}</div>
  <div>Something is due for your group project. See [Controversy Investigation](https://hrgetz.github.io/ling2801/requirements.html#paper) for more information.</div>

  <div>[]{.exam}</div>
  <div>There's an exam in class on this day. Remember to bring hard copies of any primary literature that we covered during this unit. You're allowed to use this during the exam.</div>

</div>
:::
